name: Rice Batter Bread I
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine rice flour, salt and baking powder in a bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the remaining ingredients and let set until bubbly.
3. Sprinkle water on the bottom of a 5-inch x 9-inch loaf pan and place a piece of wax paper so that it sticks to the bottom.
4. Oil and flour the sides of the pan.
5. Combine both mixtures and pour into the pan.
6. Bake for one hour at 375°F. The loaf should be lightly brown on top.
7. Leave in the pan until cool and cut with the wax paper still in place.
